task_completion.description: Verify that the specified Clearance Departments have been created in the Exit module settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a list or table in the Sentrifugo Exit module settings showing 'IT & Devices', 'Facilities', and 'Financial Accounts' as active Clearance Departments.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specified Question Categories have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Work Environment' and 'Compensation' in the Question Categories list or table within the Sentrifugo Exit module settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that the four new exit questions have been added to the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the four new questions ('Did you feel you were equipped...', 'How would you rate the physical...', 'Do you feel your compensation...', 'Were you satisfied with...') in the Sentrifugo Exit Questions list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new exit questions are correctly mapped to their respective categories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Exit Questions list or configuration view, check that the two Work Environment questions are associated with the 'Work Environment' category, and the two Compensation questions are associated with the 'Compensation' category.

task_completion.description: Verify that the legacy exit questions have been removed or deactivated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ensure that the legacy questions ('How would you rate your manager?', 'Why are you leaving?', 'Would you recommend us?') are either absent from the active Exit Questions list or clearly marked as inactive/deleted.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to configure the module rather than executing direct SQL commands in the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sentrifugo web application UI being navigated and forms being filled out, not just a terminal window with MySQL commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Sentrifugo application and did not mock the completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the local Sentrifugo URL and the Sentrifugo interface should look fully rendered with standard navigation menus, rather than a mocked HTML file or text document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually opened or read the configuration directive file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the contents of '~/Desktop/exit_process_config.txt' opened in a text editor (like gedit or nano) or printed in the terminal via a command like 'cat'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Clearance Departments: 'IT & Devices', 'Facilities', 'Financial Accounts'. Expected Question Categories: 'Work Environment', 'Compensation'. Expected Questions and Mapping: 'Did you feel you were equipped with the necessary tools to perform your job?' (Work Environment), 'How would you rate the physical working conditions?' (Work Environment), 'Do you feel your compensation was competitive with the market?' (Compensation), 'Were you satisfied with the benefits package provided?' (Compensation). Legacy Questions to be removed/deactivated: 'How would you rate your manager?', 'Why are you leaving?', 'Would you recommend us?'.
